subject: [PATCH 6/8] dax: plumb hotplug online_type through dax

2026-03-21.patch_summary: This patch allows drivers that use the dax_kmem driver to specify an auto-online policy when creating a DAX device. The policy is specified through the 'online_type' field, which can be set to a preferred auto-online policy or left to default to the system's default policy. This change enables more flexibility and control over how memory is online-ed for drivers that use dax_kmem. No functional changes are made to existing callers, ensuring backward compatibility.
